title: Fable 5 is never coming back, here's why
summary: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and frames this as a sign of emerging class stratification in AI access. The video appears to discuss implications of AI content or model restrictions.
writeup: David Ondrej reports that Fable 5 has been banned and argues it will not return. He frames the ban as evidence of emerging class stratification in AI access, where availability of models and content is split unevenly across users. The video connects this case to broader questions of AI safety and model access restrictions.
